response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song 'Cendrillon' from the on-screen text 'サンドリヨン' and audio recognition. 2. Identified the original artist as 'Signal-P'. 3. Performed web search 'Cendrillon Signal-P Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve lyrics. 4. Split the video into two scenes: the song performance and the subsequent talk/merchandise announcement segment.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance of the Vocaloid song "Cendrillon" by two VTubers, followed by an announcement segment showcasing merchandise for Himemori Luna's Birthday Live 2025.

scenes.description: Two VTubers perform a choreographed dance and sing 'Cendrillon'. The song title 'サンドリヨン' (Cendrillon) appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
夜中まで踊る夢を見せられて
時計の音が私を醒ます
硝子の靴を脱ぎ捨てて
戻れない場所へ行こう
震えてるの あなたが見る
時計が踊るの
着飾り踊るの
指先まで伸ばして
すくう薬
口づけて
走る衝動
背骨抜けていく
刹那
笑み仮面に描いて
あなたにひざまずき
まだダメと叫んだ
右手が
突き刺すサヨナラ
消せない硝声を
香水にまとう姫
強い瞳 僕の凍った
仮面ごと打ち抜く
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
After showing me a dream where I dance all night
The sound of the clock tells me it's time to wake up
Even if I take off my glass slipper
I can't return to the way I was before
I'm trembling because you're looking at me
The clock that dances with me
I want to take off this disguise and keep dancing
Until the tips of my fingers stretch out
I want to scoop it up, I want to kiss you
I want to run, I want to feel the excitement
My bones are slipping out, it's just a moment
Even if I take off this mask
I want to kneel before you
I scream 'No, not yet!'
My right hand... pierces through this goodbye
I can't erase this show
Princess in perfume
My frozen eyes, even the mask itself
I want to pierce through it all.

scenes.description: The music stops, and the VTubers transition to an announcement segment regarding merchandise for Himemori Luna's Birthday Live 2025.
